title: rhododendron pemakoense
intro: Rhododendron pemakoense, a species of flowering plant, is a rhododendron native to Yunnan Province in southwestern China. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to lower fever and reduce inflammation. Rhododendron pemakoense is believed to have health benefits such as relieving coughs and sore throats, as well as treating skin conditions like eczema. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into a decoction or infusion, which can be consumed to utilize its medicinal properties.
